quotes: Generous white space; clean, never cluttered. **Limit focal points per section** — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.
"Show, don't tell": break up text walls with imagery and icons.

rules.intent: Maintain clean, uncluttered layouts with a single dominant visual focal point per section.
rules.rule_text: Apply generous white space to maintain a clean layout. Limit focal points to a single primary element per section, directing attention through contrast. Break up text walls by incorporating supporting imagery and icons.

quotes: Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. **[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.**

rules.intent: Ensure distinct visual separation between subsequent sections in modular emails.
rules.rule_text: Adjacent assembled sections must not share identical backgrounds (White, Light Blue, Golden Sand, or gradients). Designers must declare the section background color in the component metadata so assemblers can alternate colors and prevent visual merging.

quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern

Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

rules.intent: Align layouts with the approved structure of the core brand reference materials.
rules.rule_text: Follow the canonical content block pattern (Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote) as modeled by the reference patient brochure for visuals, messaging, and overall tone.
